title: The Jimmall Ring Or True-Love Knot.
content:
Thou sent'st to me a true love-knot, but I
    Returned a ring of jimmals to imply
    Thy love had one knot, mine a triple tie.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Jimmall Ring Or True-Love Knot."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
